Microbiome data for sample: DB37.135 . ASV column represent the sequence of specific bacteria. than there is the Taxonomic levels names. and the prevelance of specific bacteria in your gut and in the healthy population in israel. For further information about each bacteria, the last column contains a link to dbBact, showing information where the specific bacteria was observed across multiple microbiome studies. The link is clickable from Excel.

An opencode command to spawn parallel agents working on the same task, each using a different LLM. Note: you must add an agent for each LLM you want to use. This approach was the easiest to get up and running.
